metadata.description: Live observability, guided skills, and a read-only MCP surface for Blender -> glTF pipelines.

plugins.name: hologram
plugins.description: Streams Claude Code activity to the hologram dashboard and exposes a read-only MCP surface for glTF assets (list_assets, inspect_asset, render_asset, tail_events, pipeline_status), plus guided skills (/hologram:start, inspect, check, status, create-skill) as the front door. The MCP server launches via uvx, so installing the plugin needs no pip step.
